{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 2, "R1.7": 3, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 4, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The output mentions prior work (Halabi et al.) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta or compare RadCalib to other methods beyond a single baseline.",
    "R1.7": "The output flags a missing citation verification, which is a good start, but doesn't delve into potential missing citations for other claims.",
    "RX.1": "The output explicitly flags uncertainty regarding the clinical applicability of the model and acknowledges limitations in the evaluation.",
    "RX.3": "The output correctly identifies the scope as head CT studies with ICH labels, but lacks details about the specific data sources and potential overlaps.",
    "RX.4": "The output does not identify any regressions or harmful patterns in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "The output mentions some provenance information but lacks detailed descriptions of the training and test datasets, as well as the CLIP-style encoder pretraining corpus."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.6,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.5
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The output mentions prior work (Halabi et al.) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta or compare RadCalib to other methods beyond a single baseline.
rationale.R1.7: The output flags a missing citation verification, which is a good start, but doesn't delve into potential missing citations for other claims.
rationale.RX.1: The output explicitly flags uncertainty regarding the clinical applicability of the model and acknowledges limitations in the evaluation.
rationale.RX.3: The output correctly identifies the scope as head CT studies with ICH labels, but lacks details about the specific data sources and potential overlaps.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not identify any regressions or harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The output mentions some provenance information but lacks detailed descriptions of the training and test datasets, as well as the CLIP-style encoder pretraining corpus.
